prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电 子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业为高热推荐，与该校优势工科专业高度契合；土木建筑类专业热度分化观望；本省2026年物理类考生约13.7万人（按历史比例估算）， 较2025年13.95万人略有减少，竞争略有缓和；该校位于山西省太原市，在重庆属跨省招生；2025年在重庆招生131人（物理类11 5+历。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的基准、2026年扩招3.5%带来的竞争加剧、软科排名持续上升 对吸引力的提升、以及本省物理类考生略有减少的缓和作用，预计2026年位次。预测最低位次约31709名，区间31209–32209名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 35214 → 26735 → 27853 → 25204 → 31257, showing significant fluctuations. After a large forward shift to 26735 in 2022, it stabilized in the 25,000–28,000 range during 2023–2024, then notably shifted backward to 31257 in 2025, a backward shift of about 6053 places in the last year, indicating large volatility. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing: 119 in 2021, 119 in 2022, 118 in 2023, 114 in 2024, 115 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 119, an increase of 4 (+3.5%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition and puts pressure on rankings to shift backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Taiyuan University of Technology is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has steadily risen from 113th in 2021 to 97th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. In 2022, there was a somewhat negative reputation signal due to university management controversies, but reputation has stabilized in recent years. Douyin popularity ranking is 63rd (comprehensive popularity 488520), rated as 'average', with main popularity coming from sports events like CUBA basketball (Northwest King), indicating moderate overall application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university; it directly corresponds to majors like Chemical Engineering and Process in the enrollment list, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc., are highly recommended hot majors, closely aligned with the university's advantageous engineering disciplines. Civil Engineering and Architecture majors show divided and wait-and-see popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in this province is approximately 137,000 (estimated by historical proportion), slightly decreasing from 139,500 in 2025, easing competition somewhat. The university is located in Taiyuan, Shanxi Province, and recruits across provinces in Chongqing; in 2025, it enrolled 131 students in Chongqing (115 in Physics Category + history).

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the benchmark of a significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, intensified competition from a 3.5% enrollment increase in 2026, increased attractiveness from the rising Soft Science ranking, and the slight easing effect from a decrease in local Physics Category candidates, the predicted 2026 ranking is approximately 31709, with a range of 31209–32209.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated narrowly between 4400 and 4900, with values approximately 4617 → 4513 → 4535 → 4416 → 4904. The enrollment plan for History Category in Chongqing: 12 students in 2021, 12 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 17 in 2024, 16 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 12 students, a reduction of 4 students (-25%) compared to 2025, a substantial cut that significantly intensifies competition and puts strong upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science ranking rose from 113th in 2021 to 97th in 2026, showing continuous improvement, which enhances its appeal to liberal arts candidates. In recent years, its reputation has been stable with no significant negative public opinion. Douyin popularity is moderate, mainly driven by CUBA basketball events, which has limited impact on liberal arts admissions. 预测结论.text: Considering the baseline of the ranking backward shift in 2025, the intensified competition due to a 25% enrollment reduction in 2026, the increased attractiveness from the rising Soft Science ranking, and the slight easing effect from the decrease in History Category examinees in this province, the predicted 2026 ranking is estimated.
